headline: Data Center Cooling Demand Will Outlast AI Bubble, Ecolab Says
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The company behind a $4.75 billion data-center cooling deal said demand for its services will keep growing even if the buildout of artificial intelligence infrastructure slows down.Ecolab Inc., which agreed last week to buy CoolIT Systems Inc. from funds managed by KKR & Co., expects revenue in its data center business to keep growing at least 20% a year “for the foreseeable future,” said Josh Magnuson, the company’s general manager for global water solutions. headline: Samsara Announces 2026 North America Customer Advisory Board, Driving AI Innovation in Physical Operations
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 24, 2026--Samsara Inc. ("Samsara") (NYSE: IOT), the pioneer of the Connected Operations® Platform, today announced its 2026 North America Customer Advisory Board (CAB). Its members run some of the world’s most complex operations, managing vast frontline workforces and critical equipment that drive significant economic value. The board provides operational insights that help Samsara build solutions that create immediate impact.

headline: JP Morgan Upgrades Ecolab to Overweight, Maintains Price Target to $295
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeffrey Zekauskas   upgrades Ecolab (NYSE:ECL) from Neutral to Overweight and maintains the price target from $295 to $295.
